title: senecio glutinosus
intro: Senecio glutinosus, also known as bush senecio, is a shrub-like plant native to Australia, characterized by its dense, greyish-green foliage and small yellow flowers. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of Senecio glutinosus have been used in herbal medicine, and they are said to possess mild anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Senecio glutinosus is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
